Solana Token Creator

from concept to token in just a few clicks

Current Progress= 30%
Estimated Coin Launch= 5 min
Upload logo
Please ensure your image is 128×128 pixels
PNG, JPG, GIF up to 5MB

How To Use The Solana Token Creator

1

Connect your Solana wallet

Simply click on the button!

2

Insert your token name and symbol

Note that your token symbol can be a maximum of 8 characters

3

Provide a brief description for your token

Just tell us a little bit about what your token stands for

4

Upload the logo for your token

Make sure it's correct pixels

5

Select the decimals quantity for your token

The standard value is recommended

6

Determine the authorities

It's recommended to use our standard settings

7

Click on Launch!

Your token will be ready in a few seconds!

How To Use SolanaLaunchTool?

At Solanalaunchtool we believe that everybody should be able to create their own tokens, not only coders! This is why solana launch tool is your key to this revolution:

Efficiency

Easy setup, instant results

Lightning Fast Launch

You Launch your token within 5 minutes!

Simplified for everyone

No coding. Just clicking

Affordable price

Budget-friendly launches
